game.objective: Watch the color sequence and repeat it from memory!
game.objectiveHint: The sequence gets longer each round

share.text: 🎮 I scored {score} points on Color Memory!

rules.title: Game Rules
rules.rule1: 4 color buttons light up in sequence
rules.rule2: Tap the colors in the same order
rules.rule3: Success adds one more color to the pattern
rules.rule5: Try to beat your highest score!

error.storage: Some features may be limited in private mode. You can continue.
error.data: Data loading error. Please refresh the page.
error.canvas: Graphics rendering issue. Please try again.
error.audio: Audio unavailable. You can still continue.
error.network: Please check your connection and try again.
error.general: Something went wrong. Please refresh or try again.
